src: So they would actually do the shopping for the material, and then they would go away and look at pattern books and decide what sort of patterns they wanted, what sort of dress it was that they wanted to make.
mt: Quindi, in realtà, facevano la spesa per il materiale, e poi se ne andavano a guardare i libri dei modelli e decidevano che tipo di modelli volevano, che tipo di abito volevano realizzare.

src: Sizzling shades of terracotta teamed with cool blue make a simple but eye-catching statement on crisp white walls.
mt: Le tonalità calde della terracotta abbinate al blu freddo creano un effetto semplice ma accattivante su pareti bianche.

src: His smile was more of a leer, and unconsciously Rory took a step nearer to Adam's powerful frame.
mt: Su sonrisa era más una mueca y, de forma inconsciente, Rory dio un paso hacia el poderoso cuerpo de Adam.

src: She took a deep breath, letting it out on a low, pleasurable chuckle as she headed for the stage.
mt: Hizo una respiración profunda y, mientras se dirigía al escenario, soltó una risita baja y placentera.

src: She could have hired a team of professionals to do the work, of course, but she'd wanted to be able to look round at the end of it all and know she'd done it.
mt: Podría haber contratado a un equipo de profesionales para hacer el trabajo, por supuesto, pero ella quería poder mirar alrededor al final de todo y saber que lo había hecho.

src: But she'd given her promise, albeit with great reluctance, not to confide the truth to her friend.
mt: Pero ella había prometido, aunque con gran reticencia, no confiar la verdad a su amiga.

src: We've actually talked about doing a deal together.
mt: De hecho, hemos hablado de hacer un trato juntos.

src: Leonora also did the cooking when the two of them were at home, but Elise was often out dining with someone, or in Stratford at the theatre with someone else.
mt: Leonora también cocinaba cuando los dos estaban en casa, pero Elise a menudo salía a cenar con alguien, o en Stratford en el teatro con otra persona.

src: She had no objection to working for her keep, but if Penry Vaughan went on treating her as if she were some kind of serf she'd stick to plain, basic cooking from now on, she thought resentfully.
mt: No tenía ninguna objeción a trabajar para ganarse la vida, pero si Penry Vaughan seguía tratandola como si fuera una especie de siervo, ella se limitaría a cocinar platos sencillos y básicos a partir de ahora, pensó resentida.

src: Head-to-toe gold makes a dramatic statement for really special outings
mt: L’oro dalla testa ai piedi è un’espressione drammatica per le uscite davvero speciali

src: Providing moments of steadiness amid the upheavals of the lovers is Anthony Bailey giving a sound performance as the local doctor.
mt: Entre los altibajos de los amantes, Anthony Bailey ofrece momentos de estabilidad con una actuación sólida como el médico local.

src: In fact where toxic substances are odorous, the odour can have a positive effect on health, effectively warning us of their presence.
mt: Infatti, quando le sostanze tossiche sono odorose, l'odore può avere un effetto positivo sulla salute, avvisandoci efficacemente della loro presenza.

src: A matron was installed, and three helpers, one of whom did the cooking.
mt: Se instaló una matrona y tres ayudantes, uno de los cuales se encargaba de la cocina.

src: In the struggle to advance, outmanoeuvre rivals and be heard by superiors, factional loyalty (loyalty to one's patron) may take precedence over policy interest.
mt: Nella lotta per avanzare, superare i rivali e farsi sentire dai superiori, la fedeltà al partito (fedeltà al proprio patrono) può avere la precedenza sugli interessi politici.

src: In 1986 the English YHA did some market research, learnt some painful truths and embarked on a modernisation programme unhandily titled ‘The Product Development Marketing Plan’.
mt: Nel 1986, l'YHA inglese ha condotto una ricerca di mercato, ha appreso alcune dolorose verità e ha dato inizio a un programma di modernizzazione dal titolo poco azzeccato "Piano di marketing per lo sviluppo del prodotto".

src: He took early retirement in 1990 after 25 years at IBM and joined Softwright a couple of months later.
mt: Se jubiló anticipadamente en 1990 después de 25 años en IBM y se incorporó a Softwright un par de meses después.

src: In effect, we are doing some of the work unpaid, with a view to getting more of the benefits when the product sells.’
mt: In effetti, stiamo facendo parte del lavoro gratuitamente, con l’obiettivo di ottenere maggiori benefici quando il prodotto verrà venduto”.

src: It was significant that, when the war took a grave turn the following year, it was to every Anglican incumbent in the land (and no doubt to many others, though I can speak only for the parish clergy) that Duff Cooper, the Home Secretary, sent letters expressing apprehension of the state of public morale and urging the incumbents to do their utmost to help raise it.
mt: Fue significativo que, cuando la guerra tomó un giro grave el año siguiente, fue a todos los anglicanos en funciones del país (y sin duda a muchos otros, aunque solo puedo hablar por el clero parroquial) a los que Duff Cooper, el Secretario del Interior, les envió cartas expresando su preocupación por el estado de la moral pública e instando a los titulares a hacer todo lo posible para ayudar a elevarla.

src: The details have escaped me, but he and Sir Andrew Clarke, as churchwardens (their memorial tablets are near to each other in the south transept) had been obliged to take legal action over the advowson — the word which, because of its precision of meaning and its sound, I could see he enjoyed introducing; but they had evidently covered themselves in so doing, because, the Anglican Church being established, their office carried official responsibilities.
mt: I dettagli mi sono sfuggiti, ma lui e Sir Andrew Clarke, in quanto sacrestani (le loro lapidi sono vicine nel transetto sud) erano stati costretti a intraprendere un'azione legale per l'advowson, una parola che, per la sua precisione di significato e il suo suono, mi sembrava gli piacesse introdurre; ma evidentemente si erano protetti in tal modo, perché, essendo la Chiesa anglicana consolidata, il loro ufficio comportava responsabilità ufficiali.

src: A short-list of five lawyers was drawn up from which Diana made her choice.
mt: Se elaboró una lista corta de cinco abogados, de los cuales Diana hizo su elección.

src: Republicans Abroad and Democrats Abroad have been allocated 200 tickets each — preference given to those who make a £25 donation.
mt: A los republicanos en el extranjero y a los demócratas en el extranjero se les ha asignado 200 entradas cada uno, dándose preferencia a aquellos que hagan una donación de 25 £.

src: Pictures of stars who have made most contribution to the music industry over the last 25 years featured at a glittering party in New York's Four Seasons Restaurant.
mt: Las imágenes de las estrellas que más han contribuido a la industria musical en los últimos 25 años se presentaron en una fiesta resplandeciente en el Four Seasons Restaurant de Nueva York.

src: Miss Crawford would probably stand a much better chance of becoming an actress if she stopped talking about it and started to do the necessary work to bring about her ambition.
mt: Probablemente, la señorita Crawford tendría muchas más posibilidades de convertirse en actriz si dejara de hablar de ello y empezara a hacer el trabajo necesario para lograr su ambición.

src: Where a plaintiff's injuries prevent him doing DIY work, which he had previously done, the extra cost of such work is recoverable as damages.
mt: Se le lesioni del richiedente gli impediscono di eseguire lavori fai-da-te che prima eseguiva, i costi supplementari di tali lavori sono recuperabili come danni.

src: If you are travelling by car, calculate as above then make the necessary accommodation only reduction as detailed on page 80.
mt: Se si viaggia in auto, calcolare come sopra e poi effettuare la necessaria riduzione dell'alloggio, come dettagliato a pagina 80.

src: He took a slight step forward and, taking his friend's chin in his hand, lifted his face so that Ludovico was forced to look up into his eyes.
mt: Él dio un pequeño paso adelante y, tomando la barbilla de su amigo con la mano, levantó su rostro para que Ludovico se viera obligado a mirar a sus ojos.

src: What they need is not a man to take care of them, but a new kind of working-class politics that would take care of them and take care of the radicalism of their case.
mt: Lo que necesitan no es un hombre que cuide de ellas, sino un nuevo tipo de política de clase trabajadora que cuide de ellas y cuide del radicalismo de su caso.

src: The question can still be raised whether Pound had any access to Virgil except through translation.
mt: La pregunta aún puede plantearse si Pound tuvo algún acceso a Virgilio, excepto a través de la traducción.

src: Mrs Cullam made no comment.
mt: La Sra. Cullam no hizo ningún comentario.

src: It was Mrs Craven's favourite garden, and she and Mr Craven used to take care of it themselves.
mt: Era il giardino preferito della signora Craven, e lei e il signor Craven ne avevano cura personalmente.

src: But their hopes took a dive in the 62nd minute when Polish striker Marcel Witeczek went on a run to score a superb individual goal.
mt: Pero sus esperanzas se desvanecieron en el minuto 62 cuando el delantero polaco Marcel Witeczek hizo una jugada para marcar un magnífico gol individual.

src: Liverpool's third choice keeper is set to jump queue ahead of David James and make his first appearance of the season in the absence of the suspended Bruce Grobbelaar.
mt: El tercer portero del Liverpool está preparado para saltar la fila por delante de David James y hacer su primera aparición de la temporada en ausencia del suspendido Bruce Grobbelaar.

src: The number of times Maguire used the whip made suspension virtually inevitable but the horse did look a difficult ride, drifting right after jumping the last.
mt: El número de veces que Maguire usó el látigo hizo que la suspensión fuera prácticamente inevitable, pero el caballo parecía difícil de montar, y se desvió hacia la derecha después de saltar la última.

src: None of this ‘feel the burn’ malarky which she says can do more harm than good.
mt: Nada de esta tontería de “sentir la quemadura” que, según ella, puede hacer más daño que bien.

src: ‘We paid almost £9,000 for the car but we will be lucky to get £4,000 for it,’ said Mr Lewis who believes the teenager should at least have been made to do community work.
mt: “Pagamos casi 9.000 £ por el coche, pero tendremos suerte si logramos obtener 4.000 £ por él”, dijo el Sr. Lewis, que cree que al menos se debería haber obligado al adolescente a hacer trabajos comunitarios.

src: A PREGNANT teenager had a miraculous escape last night when the car in which she was a passenger overturned.
mt: Una adolescente embarazada tuvo una milagrosa escapatoria anoche cuando el vehículo en el que viajaba como pasajera se volcó.

src: ‘I much prefer this music,’ Herman said, doing an awkward shuffle.
mt: “Prefiero esta música”, dijo Herman, haciendo un torpe paso de baile.

src: as if they were doing a bizarre dance, followed by Marx, Herr Nordern backed through the tiny vestibule, into the sitting-room, and a silent, apprehensive circle of Norderns.
mt: como si estuvieran haciendo una danza extraña, seguida por Marx, el señor Nordern pasó por el pequeño vestíbulo, entró en la sala de estar y un círculo silencioso y aprensivo de Norderns.

src: No, a childminder cannot normally take care of a sick child — it's not fair on the other children in her care.
mt: No, normalmente una tata non può prendersi cura di un bambino malato: non sarebbe giusto per gli altri bambini che ha in affidamento.

src: She didn't need Maggie to remind her of the odds against a baby's survival in the alleys, and she loved this one enough to make the ultimate sacrifice.
mt: Ella no necesitaba que Maggie le recordara las bajas probabilidades de supervivencia de un bebé en los callejones, y quería a este lo suficiente como para hacer el último sacrificio.

src: We also did a deep dive, to 30 metres, at Easdale Quarry on Seil Island.
mt: También hicimos una inmersión profunda, de 30 metros, en la cantera de Easdale, en la isla de Seil.

src: Soccer coaching for girls in Bristol has been given a boost from British Gas South Western.
mt: El entrenamiento de fútbol para chicas en Bristol ha recibido un impulso de British Gas South Western.

src: Then, only a beat later it seemed to him, shame and anger raced back to take possession of him again, and so overcome by these conflicting feelings was he that he had no consciousness of her in all this, until he became aware, to his surprise, that she was shaking him out of his stupor, bringing him to her again with her mouth and her hands.
mt: Luego, solo un latido después, le pareció que la vergüenza y la ira volvieron a apoderarse de él, y tan dominado estaba por estos sentimientos contradictorios que no tuvo conciencia de ella en todo esto, hasta que se dio cuenta, para su sorpresa, de que ella lo sacaba de su estupor, llevándolo de nuevo a ella con su boca y sus manos.

src: Still, in spite of the assiduous attentions which M. Apéritif and others paid her, Miranda would have liked Xanthe to make some reassuring remark in return.
mt: Sin embargo, a pesar de las atenciones asiduas que M. Apéritif y los demás le prestaban, a Miranda le hubiera gustado que Xanthe hiciera algún comentario tranquilizador a cambio.

src: The famous film director from France could speak no English, and so Miranda was being sent to do the interview as well as provide the paper's weekly caricature; she had the address of the location, a newsagent's in the High Street of a part of the city she had never heard mentioned before, Giblett Park, though she had lived in London most of her life; the Press Office had said that he would give her ten minutes between takes, or more if she were lucky and the filming was going well and Jean-Claude Meursault was feeling mellow.
mt: La famosa directora de cine francesa no hablaba inglés, así que Miranda fue enviada para hacer la entrevista y para proporcionar la caricatura semanal del periódico; tenía la dirección del lugar, una tienda de periódicos en la calle principal de una parte de la ciudad de la que nunca había oído hablar, Giblett Park, aunque había vivido en Londres la mayor parte de su vida; la oficina de prensa había dicho que le daría diez minutos entre tomas, o más si tenía suerte y la filmación iba bien y Jean-Claude Meursault se sentía bien.

src: What we are able to do in my job is to do what I was happy to do which is to give a performance in aid of a charity, one soon learns how to expend one's energy and in which direction to focus it.
mt: Quello che sono in grado di fare nel mio lavoro è fare ciò che mi rende felice, ovvero dare una performance a sostegno di un'organizzazione benefica, si impara presto come spendere la propria energia e in quale direzione concentrarla.

src: The venture capitalist has been there before; he should be able to recognise the warning signs and take appropriate action.’
mt: El capitalista de riesgo ya ha estado allí antes; debería ser capaz de reconocer las señales de advertencia y tomar las medidas adecuadas”.

src: D Ltd would then, in turn, make a franked payment to A Ltd.
mt: D Ltd effettuerebbe quindi, a sua volta, un pagamento franco a A Ltd.

src: Crawford was reported to be doing excellent work, but as the inter-provincial matches were cancelled as the war worsened, the association's finances worsened too: the Coach's Fund was now deeply in debt.
mt: Se informó que Crawford estaba haciendo un trabajo excelente, pero como los partidos interprovinciales fueron cancelados a medida que la guerra empeoraba, las finanzas de la asociación también empeoraron: el Fondo del Entrenador estaba ahora muy endeudado.

src: ‘Whatever you do, I will support you,’ he wrote in 1927, ‘and if you want to have a talk I will meet you at Annecy at lunch any day you care to name…’
mt: “Hagas lo que hagas, te apoyaré”, escribió en 1927, “y si quieres tener una charla, me reuniré contigo en Annecy para almorzar cualquier día que quieras…”

src: Erm I don't know whether Charles has said anything about who people are,Barley Hall, Charles is the historical consultant, he's done all the research .
mt: Non so se Charles ha detto qualcosa su chi sono le persone, Barley Hall, Charles è il consulente storico, ha fatto tutte le ricerche.

src: Despite qualifying sixth, the Reynard driver made a superb start and was in second place by the first corner, taking the lead from Gianni Morbidelli's Lola by the end of the lap.
mt: A pesar de clasificarse en sexta posición, el piloto de Reynard tuvo un comienzo magnífico y se puso en segundo lugar en la primera curva, y acabó pasando a la Lola de Gianni Morbidelli al final de la vuelta.

src: He had devoted Sunday evening to making a plan of action and knew exactly what he and everyone else he could press into service was going to be doing this morning.
mt: Había dedicado la tarde del domingo a elaborar un plan de acción y sabía exactamente qué iban a hacer él y todos los demás que pudiera presionar para que prestaran servicio esta mañana.

src: Peter Yeo was obviously delighted to do any service, however modest, for her and bustled her away, returning belatedly to ask McLeish if he would like a similar facility, which he accepted, obedient to the unwritten CID rule that you looked after your physical needs at any moment that opportunity offered, because you never knew when you were going to get stuck for hours without help.
mt: Peter Yeo estaba obviamente encantado de poder servirla, aunque fuera de forma modesta, y la llevó de un lado a otro, volviendo con retraso para preguntarle a McLeish si quería una instalación parecida, a lo que él aceptó, obedeciendo la norma no escrita del CID de que había que atender las necesidades físicas en cuanto se presentara la oportunidad, porque nunca se sabía cuándo se podía quedar atrapado durante horas sin ayuda.

src: Or maybe she felt she could do the briefing personally, as it were?
mt: ¿O quizás ella pensó que podía hacer la sesión de información personalmente, por así decirlo?

src: My impression was that since it was to be held in London, Angela was doing the work, with a good deal of help from colleagues at Yeo Davis.
mt: La mia impressione era che, dato che si sarebbe tenuto a Londra, Angela stava facendo il lavoro, con un buon aiuto dai colleghi di Yeo Davis.

src: SILLARS STALKER*, who was winning for the first time on the Flat when landing an apprentice handicap at Hamilton Park eight days ago, should make a successful return to the Scottish track in today's Levy Board Handicap (5.15).
mt: SILLARS STALKER*, que ganó por primera vez en una carrera plana cuando ganó un handicap para aprendices en Hamilton Park hace ocho días, debería tener un regreso exitoso a la pista escocesa en el Levy Board Handicap de hoy (5:15).

src: Jan was making a comeback this season and played in the curtain-raiser to the Currie Cup Final .
mt: Jan estaba haciendo una reaparición esta temporada y jugó en el partido de apertura de la final de la Currie Cup.

src: Students and business people alike are faced with the challenge of making the best use of their time.
mt: Studenti e uomini d'affari devono affrontare la sfida di utilizzare al meglio il proprio tempo.

src: This allows members to give a brief review of events on topics of interest to other members, and to update the progress of these events since the previous meeting.
mt: Questo permette ai membri di dare una breve rassegna degli eventi su argomenti di interesse per gli altri membri e di aggiornare i progressi di questi eventi dall'ultima riunione.

src: As a result, Mitchell has told Alan to stay put, at least until the BTR pension trustees have made their decision about the surpluses.
mt: Como resultado, Mitchell le ha dicho a Alan que se quede donde está, al menos hasta que los administradores de pensiones de BTR tomen una decisión sobre los superávit.

src: Releasing her shoulders, he took a firm grip on her arm and began steering her towards the steps down to the lawn.
mt: Al soltarle los hombros, él la agarró firmemente del brazo y empezó a dirigirla hacia los escalones que bajaban al césped.

src: She made no protest when Travis removed her boots and jumper, nor when he lay down beside her, turning her so that they lay spoon-fashion before zipping them up into the quilted cocoon.
mt: Ella no protestó cuando Travis le quitó las botas y el jersey, ni cuando se tumbó junto a ella, girándola para que quedaran en posición de cuchara antes de encerrarla en el capullo acolchado.

src: I'd like to know why it's so important to you, and I've been doing some thinking.
mt: Vorrei sapere perché è così importante per te, e ho pensato un po'.

src: Rested and fed, she was ready to do battle again.
mt: Descantada y alimentada, ella estaba lista para volver a la batalla.

src: ‘But there must be a point…when you've hosed off all the muck and the glaze and the bits of overpainting and your musks of Araby have done their work and you get to the point when you know that what you see before you is what the chap would have seen before him when he stopped painting all those centuries ago.
mt: “Pero debe haber un punto... cuando hayas quitado toda la mugre, el esmalte y los trozos de pintura que se han ido y tus musks de Araby hayan hecho su trabajo y llegues al punto en el que sabes que lo que ves delante de ti es lo que el tipo habría visto delante de él cuando dejó de pintar hace siglos.

src: Finvest's men have been making the bidding against RAI harder and harder by the season and now they are fighting on a match-by-match basis.
mt: Los hombres de Finvest han hecho que las ofertas contra la RAI sean cada vez más difíciles de conseguir a medida que avanza la temporada y ahora están luchando partido a partido.

src: Livewire offers help by giving free advice to young entrepreneurs.
mt: Livewire offre aiuto dando consigli gratuiti ai giovani imprenditori.

src: It was on one such time early last February, two months ago, when, having driven to Cheltenham to do an interview, she detoured to call in.
mt: Fue en uno de esos momentos a principios de febrero pasado, hace dos meses, cuando, tras conducir hasta Cheltenham para hacer una entrevista, se desvió para llamar.

src: Bonar Law was prepared to make the right noises — in 1913 at Manchester he called for a positive social policy in Disraelian lines for "the swing of the pendulum is not enough" , but he would give no more active support.
mt: Bonar Law estaba preparado para hacer los ruidos adecuados: en 1913, en Manchester, pidió una política social positiva en línea con Disraeli porque «el giro del péndulo no es suficiente», pero no daría un apoyo más activo.

src: Police found his body buried in a back-garden cesspit, and the widow was last seen by her next-door neighbour doing a ‘voodoo dance in the garden with blood smeared on the doorsteps.
mt: La policía encontró su cuerpo enterrado en una fosa séptica del jardín trasero, y la viuda fue vista por última vez por su vecino de al lado haciendo una “danza vudú en el jardín con sangre untada en los escalones de la puerta.

src: In particular, if the quantity of money is the prime determinant of aggregate demand, it follows from the analysis in chapter 4 that the predictable component of the rate of growth of the quantity of money will have no effect on any real variable such as the level of output or the level of unemployment; only the unpredictable or random component of monetary growth will affect real variables.
mt: In particolare, se la quantità di moneta è il fattore determinante della domanda aggregata, dalla analisi del capitolo 4 ne consegue che la componente prevedibile del tasso di crescita della quantità di moneta non avrà alcun effetto su alcuna variabile reale come il livello di produzione o il livello di disoccupazione; solo la componente imprevedibile o casuale della crescita monetaria avrà un effetto sulle variabili reali.

src: I must go to England to do the work and I want to marry Elizabeth when I return.’
mt: Devo andare in Inghilterra per fare il mio lavoro e voglio sposare Elizabeth quando tornerò.’

src: The scope for Labour to do a deal is greater.
mt: El margen de maniobra del Partido Laborista para llegar a un acuerdo es mayor.

src: A customer who has made a major purchase may then realise that he needs other, smaller items.
mt: Un cliente che ha fatto un acquisto importante potrebbe poi capire di aver bisogno di altri articoli più piccoli.

src: In order to make this decision, the retailer needs to do some market research into the socioeconomics of the area.
mt: Per prendere questa decisione, il rivenditore deve condurre delle ricerche di mercato sulle condizioni socioeconomiche dell'area.

src: If you already work in a shop — or have done shop work in the past you may find that some of the procedures described here are done differently where you work.
mt: Se lavori già in un negozio, o se in passato hai lavorato in un negozio, potresti scoprire che alcune delle procedure descritte qui sono eseguite in modo diverso dove lavori.

src: We know that Julian had at least two servants called Sara and Alice, who did her shopping and ran errands.
mt: Sabemos que Julián tenía al menos dos sirvientas llamadas Sara y Alice, que hacían las compras y las tareas domésticas.

src: It's very good good erm good thing for the party and they're usually quite starved of practical campaigning ideas and so we regularly try every at least every year to go and do a tour and erm we've been giving them we we're trying to rope them in on the various activities because they're crying out for
mt: Es algo muy bueno para el partido, que suele estar bastante desprovisto de ideas prácticas de campaña, así que intentamos regularmente, al menos una vez al año, hacer un tour y les hemos estado dando, intentamos involucrarlos en las distintas actividades porque están clamando por ello.

src: But those who really wish to curry favour with Mad Carew can sponsor a five-course dinner plus wine for two for £70 and get a generous mention on this page.
mt: Pero los que realmente quieran ganarse el favor de Mad Carew pueden patrocinar una cena de cinco platos más vino para dos por 70 £ y obtener una generosa mención en esta página.

src: She had had eight children, only four of whom survived, and had done hard physical work all her life because my grandfather had poor health.
mt: Ella había tenido ocho hijos, de los cuales solo cuatro sobrevivieron, y había hecho un duro trabajo físico toda su vida porque mi abuelo tenía mala salud.

src: Please note that the individual hotels may make a charge for car parking.
mt: Si prega di notare che i singoli hotel possono addebitare un costo per il parcheggio.

src: But the note that accompanied it made no mention of the choice of name and it was rather a cold note.
mt: Pero la nota que lo acompañaba no hacía mención alguna a la elección del nombre y era una nota bastante fría.

src: In fact he had even made some appropriately sophisticated comment.
mt: De hecho, incluso había hecho un comentario apropiadamente sofisticado.

src: I knew he loved and needed me, but the fact that while I washed up, scrubbed, cleaned and tidied for us both he was making contact with people I had never met, would never meet, and whose names I did not know, formed a cloud over my days.
mt: Sabía que me quería y que me necesitaba, pero el hecho de que mientras yo me lavaba, fregaba, limpiaba y ordenaba para los dos, él estaba en contacto con personas que nunca había conocido, que nunca conocería y cuyos nombres no sabía, formaba una nube sobre mis días.

src: The ‘naked’ crab moved about 60 cm (2 ft) away while the first crab nipped out of its damaged shell and took up residence in the new one.
mt: El cangrejo “desnudo” se desplazó unos 60 cm (2 pies) mientras el primero salía de su caparazón dañado y se instalaba en el nuevo.

src: Hopefully, the reader has now some appreciation of the various payment methods, sources of finance and risks associated with international trade.
mt: Si spera che il lettore abbia ora una certa comprensione dei vari metodi di pagamento, delle fonti di finanziamento e dei rischi associati al commercio internazionale.

src: I would bounce on a bed till I was high enough, then I'd do the turn, backwards and forwards.
mt: Saltaba en la cama hasta que estaba lo suficientemente alto, y luego hacía la vuelta, hacia atrás y hacia adelante.

src: Also, Tabitha never quite got around to doing as much maintenance as she meant to.
mt: Además, Tabitha nunca llegó a hacer tanto mantenimiento como tenía pensado.

src: Among the Tchambuli, yet further variation occurred: men adorned themselves, gossiped, made things for trade, while women selected their partners, made the sexual advances, did all the trade, and were the more aggressive sex.
mt: Tra i Tchambuli, si verificò un'ulteriore variazione: gli uomini si ornavano, parlavano di pettegolezzi, producevano oggetti per il commercio, mentre le donne sceglievano i loro partner, facevano le avances sessuali, si occupavano di tutto il commercio ed erano il sesso più aggressivo.

src: Such brief ‘thumb-nail’ sketches do give some indication of the essence of sociology, but ultimately it is both necessary and perhaps more fruitful to emphasise that the most important and distinctive feature of sociology is not so much what is studied but how it is studied, i.e. it is important to indicate what is the particular perspective of sociology, its distinct way of looking at the individual and society.
mt: Questi brevi schizzi “schematici” danno un’idea dell’essenza della sociologia, ma in definitiva è necessario e forse più fruttuoso sottolineare che la caratteristica più importante e distintiva della sociologia non è tanto ciò che viene studiato, ma il modo in cui viene studiato, cioè è importante indicare quale sia la prospettiva particolare della sociologia, il suo modo distinto di guardare l’individuo e la società.

src: Andy took a deep breath and patted my head, chuckling.
mt: Andy respiró profundamente y me dio una palmada en la cabeza, riendo.

src: Who the heck is doing the hiring and firing around here, anyway?’

mt: “Hicimos una gira con Mitch y también hicimos una gira con Buddy Miles, pero nunca los hemos tenido a los dos juntos en la misma habitación.

src: Hence the company will not be estopped in the example given above; it has not made any false statement.

src: When you have made an initial assessment of your strengths and weaknesses you will find it easier to recognize work for which you are genuinely suited.

mt: Che si tratti di una risposta a un annuncio o di una richiesta di lavoro generica, i seguenti punti si applicano

mt: Per esempio, se avete già messo a disposizione materiale che tratta di questioni come ferie/pensioni/condizioni di lavoro e il candidato sceglie di chiedere a riguardo, potrebbe indicare che non è il tipo di persona che fa un lavoro di background approfondito.

src: He stepped out of her way and she took a deep breath as she ran to the door and slammed it shut behind her.

src: It is tempting to take the cynical view that compact disc is ‘all in the numbers’, and in most cases there is little to choose between them.
mt: Es tentador adoptar la visión cínica de que el disco compacto es “todo un número”, y en la mayoría de los casos hay poco que elegir entre ellos.

src: This would, in fact, make an ideal introduction to the works, were it not for the fact that the packaging completely misleads the purchaser as to the playing order of the music: it is listed as (in order)— but the disc actually plays , so that there's not a single track which corresponds with the one listed in the sleeve note!
mt: In effetti, questo sarebbe un'introduzione ideale alle opere, se non fosse per il fatto che l'imballaggio inganna completamente l'acquirente sull'ordine di riproduzione della musica: è elencato come (in ordine) - ma il disco in realtà riproduce , quindi non c'è una singola traccia che corrisponde a quella elencata nella nota di copertina!

src: Worse still was the Tories' refusal year after year to make the essential commitment to the productive base of the economy — education and training, research and development, science, transport and communication.
mt: Ancora peggio è stato il rifiuto dei Tory, anno dopo anno, di assumere l'impegno essenziale per la base produttiva dell'economia: istruzione e formazione, ricerca e sviluppo, scienza, trasporti e comunicazioni.

src: In a letter to the Stanford committee on research, the faculty said: ‘For years we have been able to tell visiting school children, student, engineers, scientists, laymen and the press that we are here to do basic research on the fundamental properties of matter and that we do not do any military work.
mt: In una lettera al comitato di ricerca di Stanford, la facoltà ha dichiarato: "Per anni siamo stati in grado di dire ai bambini delle scuole, agli studenti, agli ingegneri, agli scienziati, ai laici e alla stampa che siamo qui per fare ricerca di base sulle proprietà fondamentali della materia e che non facciamo alcun lavoro militare.

src: So the capacity to make a thorough survey of the subject is inhibited by one of its most important characteristics.

src: If the loans were found to have been sold at a loss, the vendor would make a repayment, dependent on whether there had been a reduction in the bank's tax liability or not.

src: The choice of reference, whether it is to be to expert or arbitrator, is in any event usually made at the time of the original contract which precedes the time when the parties know whether they have an "issue to settle" or a "formulated dispute" , and they will be obliged to use whatever procedure was stipulated, unless they make some fresh agreement.
mt: La scelta del riferimento, sia esso un esperto o un arbitro, è in ogni caso solitamente effettuata al momento del contratto originale che precede il momento in cui le parti sanno se hanno una "questione da risolvere" o una "controversia formulata", e saranno obbligate a utilizzare qualsiasi procedura sia stata stipulata, a meno che non stipulino un nuovo accordo.

mt: Le agradezco al ministro su respuesta, pero ¿no estaría de acuerdo conmigo en que, cuando las autoridades locales, las cámaras de comercio locales y los consejos de comercio y su propio departamento de empleo ya están trabajando bien juntos en buenas iniciativas pequeñas, ponerles encima a English Estates, TECs, British Coal Enterprise, es en realidad hacer precisamente lo que él no defiende: crear un crecimiento explosivo de la burocracia, y ¿no se compromete a evaluar estas iniciativas para ver si realmente funcionan o si solo están creando puestos de trabajo para los chicos?

src: Elite theory accounts of state organization are developed and detailed, and we first review five aspects where the approach has made a distinctive contribution: the role of political leaderships in liberal democracies, the predominance of bureaucracies in shaping policy-making, the reasons for fragmentation (or centralization) of governmental tiers and sectors, the role of law, and the strong policy connections between government activities and major economic interests.

src: Really we still know very little about what teachers actually do in the classroom and it's all very well standing back in university and saying teachers should do this and should do that, but in order to be able to offer guidance I think we really need to do more research in mixed ability classrooms to discover how teachers at the moment are dealing with the situation and where we might offer them more support, and that's the direction I'd like to see research going; rather than more of the grandiose large-scale quantitative studies, which collect lots of figures and statistics, I'd like to see a lot more studies in actual classrooms looking at actual teachers teaching, looking at what they do and how we can improve that.
mt: In realtà sappiamo ancora molto poco su cosa fanno realmente gli insegnanti in classe e va bene stare all'università e dire che gli insegnanti dovrebbero fare questo e dovrebbero fare quello, ma per poter offrire indicazioni penso che dobbiamo davvero fare più ricerche nelle classi con studenti di diverse abilità per scoprire come gli insegnanti al momento stanno gestendo la situazione e dove possiamo offrire loro più supporto, e questa è la direzione che vorrei vedere nella ricerca; piuttosto che più di questi studi quantitativi grandiosi su larga scala, che raccolgono un sacco di cifre e statistiche, vorrei vedere molti più studi nelle aule reali che guardano gli insegnanti reali che insegnano, che guardano cosa fanno e come possiamo migliorarlo.

src: It is interesting to make the obvious observation that, while the first and last named are fanatical behaviourists, believing that everything is subject to unlimited moulding and rearrangement through a process of reward and punishment, the three in the middle are fanatical instinctivists, insisting that virtually everything and anything is inherited, a gift (or a grief) of the genes and not subject to the environment.

src: I suppose well my children would say my answer to everything is to say to them breathe, you know, and erm you know just do very simple relaxation if nothing else, and then that allows you maybe to start looking at other things, but to get to the state where you can begin to look at things without the fears and emotions getting in the way.

mt: Bueno, creo que lo que realmente anima a esto es el hecho de que los sitios gitanos que se ven en el condado en este momento, porque hay muy poco control sobre ellos, son muy antiestéticos y causan un daño considerable al campo, y la gente no quiere que esto suceda en su propio área.

src: All I was told is that you're getting twelve months guarantee, but you've got to have a three thousand mile service, and as the gentleman said erm I recorded the deliveries and sent them all back and on the third one, when I took it in I asked if they'd put a new set of points in for me and erm unfortunately when it came out there was no compression at all and because because I it was suggested that I dug my heels in a bit and got an independent report and erm basically they told me to get lost because it cost fifty pound to do the report.
mt: Lo único que me dijeron es que tienes una garantía de doce meses, pero que tienes que hacer un servicio de tres mil millas, y como dijo el caballero, grabé las entregas y las envié todas de vuelta y en la tercera, cuando la llevé, le pregunté si habían puesto un nuevo juego de puntos para mí y, por desgracia, cuando salió, no había ninguna compresión y, como porque me sugirieron que me plantara firme y que hiciera un informe independiente y, básicamente, me dijeron que me fuera porque costaba cincuenta libras hacer el informe.

src: I mean if it were the case that we got on the way to establishing an appropriate atmosphere in the colleges, one where women felt comfortable and where they felt they could get the most from their educational experience, I think that would have profound impact on people's later lives.
mt: Voglio dire, se riuscissimo a creare un'atmosfera appropriata nei college, dove le donne si sentano a loro agio e possano trarre il massimo dalla loro esperienza educativa, penso che avrebbe un profondo impatto sulla vita successiva delle persone.

src: Don't you think you should wait to hear my offer before you make such a judgement?’
mt: Non pensi che dovresti aspettare di sentire la mia offerta prima di esprimere un giudizio del genere?’

src: Come here,cara , and let me get a closer look.’
mt: Ven aquí, cara, y déjame echar un vistazo más de cerca”.

src: The landlord took hold of Garty's collar.
mt: El casero agarró el cuello de Garty.

src: People were squeezing towards the raised pit to get a better look at the fighting cocks.
mt: La gente se agolpaba hacia el hoyo elevado para tener una mejor visión de los gallos que peleaban.

src: Where illness leads to loss of sight, speech or hearing it diminishes an individual's ability to make use of counselling assistance.
mt: Quando la malattia porta alla perdita della vista, della parola o dell'udito, diminuisce la capacità dell'individuo di usufruire dell'assistenza di consulenza.

src: When he moved to his present school, he abandoned individualised learning and lessons fell very much into the mode of ‘exposition by the teacher, pupils do the exercise’.
mt: Quando si è trasferito nella sua scuola attuale, ha abbandonato l’apprendimento individualizzato e le lezioni sono diventate molto simili a una “esposizione da parte dell’insegnante, gli alunni fanno gli esercizi”.

src: Both discussion and the way that activities were tackled gave some indication of children's understanding of the ideas.
mt: Sia la discussione che il modo in cui sono state affrontate le attività hanno fornito alcune indicazioni sulla comprensione dei bambini delle idee.

src: Trying not to show that she was completely at a loss, Sophie made a careful examination, then, taking out her stethoscope, she gestured to the herdsman to hold the calf steady while she listened to her patient's lungs.
mt: Tratando de no mostrar que estaba completamente perdida, Sophie hizo un examen cuidadoso y, sacando su estetoscopio, le hizo señas al ganadero que sujetara al ternero mientras escuchaba los pulmones de su paciente.

src: Joanna's depression vanished immediately and she set off to do the shopping in high spirits while Sophie, equally elated, went to the surgery.
mt: La depresión de Joanna desapareció inmediatamente y se fue de compras con el ánimo alto mientras Sophie, igualmente eufórica, fue a la consulta.

src: It was very satisfactory and the two girls went to Helen's flat to celebrate with a drink and discuss the possibility of doing work for the pet shop in Seabourne.
mt: Fue muy satisfactorio y las dos chicas fueron al departamento de Helen para celebrar con una bebida y hablar de la posibilidad de trabajar para la tienda de mascotas en Seabourne.

src: The venture will provide analysis of existing deposits and do interpretation of data from potential new fields.
mt: L’iniziativa prevede l’analisi dei giacimenti esistenti e l’interpretazione dei dati relativi a potenziali nuovi giacimenti.

src: He gestured for her to move aside so he could take a closer look at the microphone.
mt: Hizo un gesto para que ella se apartara para poder echar un vistazo más de cerca al micrófono.

src: Many more of the 226 schools that have taken control of their own affairs in the past three years fear victimisation if they are returned to hostile local authorities.
mt: Molte delle 226 scuole che hanno preso il controllo dei propri affari negli ultimi tre anni temono di essere vittime se verranno restituite a autorità locali ostili.

src: There are clear ‘fits’ between the two lists, giving support to the view that a synergetic relationship is possible, and some obvious benefits are almost bound to derive from bringing two organisations together, just as sitting next to Nellie traditionally gradually fused the experience of the expert with the youthful vigour of the apprentice.
mt: Ci sono chiare "combinazioni" tra le due liste, che confermano l'idea che una relazione sinergica sia possibile, e alcuni evidenti vantaggi sono quasi inevitabili quando si uniscono due organizzazioni, proprio come quando, seduti accanto a Nellie, l'esperienza dell'esperto si fonde gradualmente con il vigore giovanile dell'apprendista.

src: It said Elizabeth Tamposi, already fired by President Bush, and her officials in the State Department's consular affairs bureau took the action in ‘partisan hopes of derailing the Clinton campaign.’
mt: Señaló que Elizabeth Tamposi, ya despedida por el presidente Bush, y sus funcionarios de la oficina de asuntos consulares del Departamento de Estado tomaron la medida con “esperanzas partidistas de descarrilar la campaña de Clinton”.

src: Amongst smaller introduced animals are fire ants, which out-compete with the native ants (and which can cause uncomfortable nights for camping scientists); and cockroaches, which have been discovered on one or two islands and may have been transported inadvertently amongst supplies destined for scientists doing long-term research.
mt: Tra gli animali introdotti più piccoli ci sono le formiche rosse, che competono con le formiche autoctone (e che possono causare notti scomode per gli scienziati che fanno campeggio); e gli scarafaggi, che sono stati scoperti su una o due isole e potrebbero essere stati trasportati inavvertitamente tra le provviste destinate agli scienziati che fanno ricerche a lungo termine.

src: For many years the station scientists did little research on these introduced species, probably because no one could foresee the possibility of eradicating them.
mt: Per molti anni gli scienziati della stazione hanno fatto poche ricerche su queste specie introdotte, probabilmente perché nessuno poteva prevedere la possibilità di eradicarle.

src: ‘I wondered if there were any external pressures that led your husband to make the change.’
mt: “Me preguntaba si había alguna presión externa que llevó a su esposo a hacer el cambio”.

src: The decision is quashed and the authority makes a fresh and legal decision.
mt: La decisione è annullata e l’autorità prende una nuova decisione conforme alla legge.

src: ‘Look, couldn't we just go along to the pub and have a quiet drink and talk about fishing instead?’ he pleaded.
mt: “Mira, ¿no podríamos ir a la taberna y tomar una copa tranquila y hablar de pesca en su lugar?”, suplicó.

src: They usually incorporate internal steel members for extra strength, and because of the relatively large cross-section of the various stiles and rails they can make an appropriate replacement for many older-style houses with timber windows.
mt: Di solito incorporano elementi in acciaio interni per una maggiore resistenza e, grazie alla sezione trasversale relativamente ampia dei vari montanti e binari, possono costituire una sostituzione appropriata per molte case in stile antico con finestre in legno.

src: The next time you call at your local council offices to collect some forms for making a Building Regulations application, don't be surprised if you are asked, ‘What type of forms do you want — Full plans or Building Notice?’
mt: La prossima volta che vi recate presso gli uffici del vostro comune per ritirare dei moduli per presentare una richiesta di regolamento edilizio, non stupitevi se vi viene chiesto: “Che tipo di moduli desiderate: piani completi o notifica di costruzione?”

src: Hence, an illusion that the children would sooner or later return home was sustained, mitigating the need to plan for another outcome which, in any case, was considered inferior and likely to do as much harm as good.
mt: Quindi, si manteneva l'illusione che i bambini sarebbero tornati a casa prima o poi, mitigando la necessità di pianificare un altro esito che, in ogni caso, era considerato inferiore e in grado di fare tanto male quanto bene.

src: I am not going out of my mind, she thought, and if, at the moment, the outside world does not recognise me for what I am, my sister knows she has only to speak a word here and there, to take a decision, and who will listen to me?
mt: No me estoy volviendo loca, pensó, y si, de momento, el mundo exterior no me reconoce por lo que soy, mi hermana sabe que solo tiene que decir una palabra aquí y allá, tomar una decisión, y ¿quién me escuchará?

src: Sharing in such a personal faith gives unity to the diversity of human beings, bringing us together with others.
mt: La condivisione di una fede così personale dà unità alla diversità degli esseri umani, ci riunisce con gli altri.

src: All the same, he insisted on doing a final tour.
mt: Aun así, insistió en hacer una última gira.

src: The industry is trying to be seen to be more responsible, take a longer-term view and structure transactions more prudently.
mt: Il settore sta cercando di apparire più responsabile, di adottare una visione a più lungo termine e di strutturare le transazioni in modo più prudente.

src: S1 makes a management charge covering a variety of commonly incurred expenditure (including his services) to S2: however, no analysis of this recharge is available.
mt: S1 addebita a S2 una commissione di gestione che copre una serie di spese comunemente sostenute (compresi i suoi servizi); tuttavia, non è disponibile alcuna analisi di questo addebito.

src: And now Scottish Natural Heritage has asked the Institute of Terrestrial Ecology, Banchory, in liaison with the Scottish Agricultural Statistics Service and Biosphere Consultancies, to do a study to determine the current status of adders in Scotland.
mt: Ahora, Scottish Natural Heritage ha pedido al Institute of Terrestrial Ecology, Banchory, en colaboración con el Scottish Agricultural Statistics Service y Biosphere Consultancies, que haga un estudio para determinar el estado actual de las víboras en Escocia.

src: Ken Coates, Nottingham's MEP and my colleague at the Russell Foundation for whom I do some research, has raised the alert on this.
mt: Ken Coates, deputato europeo di Nottingham e mio collega alla Russell Foundation per la quale faccio delle ricerche, ha lanciato l'allarme su questo.

src: Just telephone the nearest Cosmos office to make a holiday booking for any UK departure point.
mt: Basta chiamare l'ufficio Cosmos più vicino per prenotare una vacanza da qualsiasi punto di partenza nel Regno Unito.

src: Having made the somewhat contentious statement on Caribbean parents' distorted appreciation of their function in relation to their children's formal education, I am left to qualify and substantiate, particularly as it has a weighty bearing on the general argument of the entire book.
mt: Dopo aver fatto la dichiarazione, in parte controversa, sulla percezione distorta dei genitori caraibici del loro ruolo in relazione all'istruzione formale dei loro figli, mi sento in dovere di qualificarla e di motivarla, soprattutto perché ha un'incidenza notevole sull'argomento generale dell'intero libro.

src: ‘Gentleman Jim’ had previously retired from the ring rather than do combat with a black man, but was tempted in an effort to curb the mounting confidence of blacks and re-establish white dominance in the sport.
mt: “Gentleman Jim” ya se había retirado del ring en lugar de luchar contra un hombre negro, pero se sintió tentado de volver para tratar de frenar la creciente confianza de los negros y restablecer el dominio blanco en el deporte.

src: We ran the experiment in 12 sessions of eight subjects each; eight of the sessions involved the eight groups, the remaining four sessions the subjects doing the experiment on an individual basis.
mt: Abbiamo condotto l'esperimento in 12 sessioni di otto soggetti ciascuna; otto delle sessioni hanno coinvolto gli otto gruppi, le restanti quattro sessioni i soggetti che hanno fatto l'esperimento su base individuale.

src: Although many people do not make such a dramatic move from a very special garden to a flat, most of us leave a few favourite plants behind when we move house, so framing a few of them serves as a lovely reminder of times gone by.
mt: Anche se molte persone non fanno una scelta così drastica passando da un giardino molto speciale a un appartamento, la maggior parte di noi lascia alcune piante preferite quando si trasferisce, quindi incorniciarne alcune serve come piacevole ricordo dei tempi passati.

src: However, care should be taken not to use a professional counsellor as a "fixer" who enables one to avoid doing any real work of one's own.
mt: Tuttavia, occorre fare attenzione a non utilizzare un consulente professionale come un "riparatore" che consente di evitare di fare un vero lavoro da soli.

src: Because they hadn't done any management, Debbie felt Landlords were entitled only to the 10 per cent tenant-finding fee and therefore owed her £2,400 (3 months' rent plus the deposit).
mt: Como no habían hecho ninguna gestión, Debbie pensó que los propietarios solo tenían derecho al 10 % de la comisión de búsqueda de inquilinos y, por lo tanto, le debían 2.400 £ (3 meses de alquiler más el depósito).

src: THERE is no need for Mr Smith to impose taxes on capital or on financial institutions though: his policies look set to do their damage by knocking the most valuable asset owned by most voters — their homes.
mt: No hay necesidad de que el Sr. Smith imponga impuestos al capital o a las instituciones financieras, aunque: sus políticas parecen destinadas a causar daños al golpear el activo más valioso que poseen la mayoría de los votantes: sus hogares.

src: Consultants told the paper that IBM has been dissecting the two most recent pre-release versions of NT at its Toronto labs to assess the time and money that would be required to do the implementation, and reckon a product could arrive at the turn of the year.
mt: I consulenti hanno dichiarato al giornale che IBM ha analizzato le due versioni più recenti di NT in anteprima nei suoi laboratori di Toronto per valutare il tempo e i soldi necessari per l'implementazione e stimano che un prodotto potrebbe arrivare alla fine dell'anno.

src: If you feel that your award is wrong in some way you can ask for the decision to be reviewed or make an appeal — details of how to do this are available from social security benefit offices.
mt: Se ritiene che la prestazione gli sia stata calcolata in modo errato, può chiedere che la decisione sia riesaminata o presentare ricorso; i dettagli su come procedere sono disponibili presso gli uffici delle prestazioni di sicurezza sociale.

src: Whilst coping with immediate problems, it was important to take the long-term view.
mt: Pur affrontando i problemi immediati, è importante adottare una prospettiva a lungo termine.

src: He'd call it doing research.
mt: Él lo llamaría hacer investigación.

src: Stories were told about how they had actually done considerable damage to some visiting fans when situations had got out of hand.
mt: Se contaron historias sobre cómo habían hecho un daño considerable a algunos aficionados visitantes cuando las situaciones se habían salido de control.

src: It's real good when they do the work in the lounge int it Iris?
mt: Es realmente bueno cuando hacen el trabajo en el salón, ¿verdad, Iris?

src: During the succession crisis of 1553, Edward's Roman Catholic sister Mary studiously declined to make any public statement about the possibility of a restoration of papal authority in England.
mt: Durante la crisis sucesoria de 1553, la hermana católica romana de Eduardo, María, se negó a hacer ninguna declaración pública sobre la posibilidad de una restauración de la autoridad papal en Inglaterra.

src: Without such a juxtaposition, you cannot make a rational assessment of twentieth century design.
mt: Senza una tale giustapposizione, non è possibile fare una valutazione razionale del design del ventesimo secolo.

src: The best type for a luxury lawn, these cut with a scissor action to give a good finish.
mt: Il tipo migliore per un prato di lusso, questi tagliano con un movimento di forbice per dare una buona finitura.

src: Their Anglo-Italian Cup-tie with Ascoli erupted in two minutes of fury — but the Football League will take no action.
mt: Su empate en la Copa Anglo-Italiana con el Ascoli se convirtió en dos minutos de furia, pero la Football League no tomará ninguna medida.

src: Platt made a flying visit to Birmingham yesterday to announce a new sponsorship deal with Brymon European Airways before re-turning to Italy for a Juventus friendly tonight.
mt: Platt hizo una visita relámpago a Birmingham ayer para anunciar un nuevo acuerdo de patrocinio con Brymon European Airways antes de volver a Italia para un amistoso con la Juventus esta noche.

src: OLDHAM made a loss of more than £500,000 last season — their first back in the top flight for more than 60 years.
mt: El Oldham tuvo pérdidas de más de 500.000 £ la temporada pasada, su primera en la máxima división en más de 60 años.

src: Sometimes I will have abandoned a painting, got really tired of it and feel it's not getting anywhere, and you will come and make some remark that makes me look at it again and think: oh yes, I could just pull that one together.
mt: A veces he abandonado una pintura, me he cansado mucho de ella y siento que no va a ninguna parte, y tú vienes y haces algún comentario que me hace mirarla de nuevo y pensar: oh sí, podría juntar esa.

src: No need to be stationary when making a mark.
mt: Non è necessario essere fermi quando si fa un segno.

src: And Lady Paignton, whom you met yesterday, is always saying she wished she had somebody to do shopping for her.
mt: Y Lady Paignton, a quien conociste ayer, siempre dice que le gustaría tener a alguien que haga las compras por ella.

src: They also took their campaign onto the national stage through their participation in the Anti-Nuclear Power Show at the Carnsore Point site.
mt: También llevaron su campaña a un escenario nacional a través de su participación en el espectáculo Anti-Nuclear Power en el sitio de Carnsore Point.

src: National Semiconductor made a brave attempt with its LM32900, and the take-over of Fairchild saw the demise of the FSP100.
mt: National Semiconductor ha fatto un tentativo coraggioso con il suo LM32900, e l'acquisizione di Fairchild ha visto la scomparsa del FSP100.

src: Ali Idrissi Kaitouni was given a 15-year sentence for writing poems about social injustice and political oppression in Morocco, deemed by the state to constitute a crime against internal security.
mt: Ali Idrissi Kaitouni è stato condannato a 15 anni di carcere per aver scritto poesie sull'ingiustizia sociale e l'oppressione politica in Marocco, considerate dal governo un crimine contro la sicurezza interna.

src: Four tries went to flanker Mike Budd , making an impressive return to action after prolonged injury problems.
mt: El flanker Mike Budd hizo cuatro ensayos, marcando un impresionante regreso a la acción tras un largo período de lesiones.

src: In an interview after the game he said, ‘In La Rochelle we never start a game with the intention of doing harm.
mt: En una entrevista después del partido, dijo: “En La Rochelle nunca empezamos un partido con la intención de hacer daño.

src: Individuals make their response not as one man islands, but within a framework of family, group, community and national involvements.
mt: Gli individui non reagiscono come isole, ma all'interno di un contesto di coinvolgimenti familiari, di gruppo, comunitari e nazionali.

src: One suburban Anglican church in Surrey, England discovered on doing this exercise that they had to gain on average thirty-four new members each year just to stay where they were in terms of membership, such was the high level of mobility in their community.
mt: Una iglesia anglicana de un suburbio de Surrey, Inglaterra, descubrió al hacer este ejercicio que tenían que ganar en promedio treinta y cuatro nuevos miembros cada año solo para mantenerse donde estaban en términos de membresía, tal era el alto nivel de movilidad en su comunidad.

src: They were kept waiting for four hours before being given clearance to cover the Match of The Century (starring Paul Gascoigne).
mt: Los hicieron esperar cuatro horas antes de que les dieran permiso para cubrir el Partido del Siglo (con Paul Gascoigne como protagonista).

src: Nynex Corp's New York Telephone has done a deal with Newbridge Networks Inc for equipment to enable it to offer Nynex Enterprise Services, which provides business customers with private line services whereby with a single telephone call, they can reroute transmissions, add new circuits and raise available bandwidth to set up videoconferences: Newbridge is supplying its 4602 MainStreet Intelligent NetworkStation, 3645 MainStreet High Capacity Bandwidth Manager, and 3624 MainStreet Intelligent Channel Bank.
mt: New York Telephone de Nynex Corp ha cerrado un acuerdo con Newbridge Networks Inc para el suministro de equipos que le permitirán ofrecer Nynex Enterprise Services, que proporciona a los clientes empresariales servicios de línea privada que, con una sola llamada telefónica, les permiten reencaminar las transmisiones, añadir nuevos circuitos y aumentar el ancho de banda disponible para establecer videoconferencias: Newbridge suministra su 4602 MainStreet Intelligent NetworkStation, 3645 MainStreet High Capacity Bandwidth Manager y 3624 MainStreet Intelligent Channel Bank.

src: They were excellent in every aspect and always more than willing to give positive practical advice to allow hotel managers to conduct their business with the backing of a truly professional team.
mt: Sono stati eccellenti sotto ogni aspetto e sempre più che disposti a dare consigli pratici e positivi per consentire ai gestori di hotel di condurre la loro attività con il supporto di un team davvero professionale.

src: This is seen as an important means of getting away from the elitist concept and encouraging everyone to take a longer view, even if his or her immediate task involves short-term objectives.
mt: Si tratta di un mezzo importante per uscire dal concetto elitario e per incoraggiare tutti a guardare più lontano, anche se il proprio compito immediato comporta obiettivi a breve termine.

src: We made two hundred and forty five pounds on Thriller of the Year one hundred and nineteen pounds on Tea for Two but that is after we've made the three hundred pounds donation to Whiston Hospital we made a thousand and eighteen pounds on the panto Wuthering Heights we lost four hundred and nine pounds, but that was basically that we do costume plays and have to hire the erm fixtures and set pieces from Wrightsons or wherever we're always going to be in this position and I think it's the tradition of the Garrick that we continue to do them, and I think we have to accept that we may have losses in future on those particular erm things.
mt: Hicimos doscientos cuarenta y cinco libras con Thriller of the Year, ciento diecinueve libras con Tea for Two, pero eso fue después de que hiciéramos la donación de trescientos libras al Whiston Hospital. Hicimos mil dieciocho libras con el panto Wuthering Heights, perdimos cuatrocientos nueve libras, pero eso fue básicamente porque hacemos obras de teatro y tenemos que alquilar los accesorios y los decorados de Wrightsons o de cualquier otro sitio. Siempre estaremos en esta posición y creo que es la tradición del Garrick que sigamos haciéndolos, y creo que tenemos que aceptar que podemos tener pérdidas en el futuro con estas cosas en particular.

src: Children aged 5–16 years will be given a 50% reduction on the adult price if sharing a room with an adult.
mt: Ai bambini di età compresa tra 5 e 16 anni verrà applicato uno sconto del 50% sulla tariffa per adulti se condividono la camera con un adulto.

src: They will identify and ‘think through’ the issues — or rather do the market analysis that substitutes for political thought — and create the slogans and policies in terms of the conditioned reflexes of the electorate which can be controlled by political advertising on the issues.
mt: Essi identificheranno e “ponderanno” i problemi – o meglio, faranno l’analisi di mercato che sostituisce il pensiero politico – e creeranno gli slogan e le politiche in termini di riflessi condizionati dell’elettorato che possono essere controllati dalla pubblicità politica sui problemi.

src: In an amiable parody of an interview he once heard being given by Sir Adrian Boult, Gould spelt out the attitude to recording of that older generation: roughly, ‘I don't mind doing the occasional recording, old boy — not everyone gets to concerts — and we'll do our best, but I don't want any ‘patching’, we must keep the long line intact’.
mt: En una amable parodia de una entrevista que una vez escuchó que daba Sir Adrian Boult, Gould explicó la actitud hacia la grabación de esa generación anterior: más o menos, «no me importa hacer la grabación ocasional, viejo amigo, no todo el mundo puede ir a los conciertos, y haremos todo lo posible, pero no quiero ningún «retoque», debemos mantener la larga línea intacta».

src: She lied to me, though, when I asked at about the age of eight what she'd done: she said she'd worked in an office, done clerical work.
mt: Sin embargo, ella me mintió cuando le pregunté, cuando tenía unos ocho años, qué había hecho: dijo que había trabajado en una oficina, haciendo trabajos de oficina.

src: His opponents, massed in Cable Street, were determined that he should not pass, and 6,000 police were needed to keep order and to make an attempt at clearing the way.
mt: Sus oponentes, reunidos en Cable Street, estaban decididos a que no pasara, y se necesitaron 6.000 policías para mantener el orden e intentar despejar el camino.

src: Joyce described a crowd of three or four hundred blocking the way, shouting, chanting, and giving the clenched fist salute of the ‘Red Front’.
mt: Joyce describió una multitud de tres o cuatrocientos que bloqueaban el camino, gritando, cantando y dando el saludo de puño cerrado del ‘Frente Rojo’.

src: Accompanied by Sophia Rahman, he made a most imaginative choice of programme — the surprisingly neglected Schumann A minor Sonata, Dallapiccola's Two Studies and, best of all, Szymanowski's Nocturne and Tarantella.
mt: Acompañado por Sophia Rahman, hizo una elección de programa muy imaginativa: la sorprendentemente descuidada Sonata en la menor de Schumann, los Dos estudios de Dallapiccola y, lo mejor de todo, el Nocturno y la Tarantela de Szymanowski.

src: The girls sat down on a large pew-looking bench in the alcove and laughed at Billy who was standing with his back to the blazing logs doing his knee bending policeman act.
mt: Las chicas se sentaron en un gran banco parecido a un banco de iglesia en el alcoba y se rieron de Billy, que estaba de pie con la espalda hacia los troncos ardientes haciendo el gesto de doblarse el codo de un policía.

src: One would expect some cases to get widespread coverage, especially when there is serious re-offending after a previous life sentence.
mt: Ci si aspetterebbe che alcuni casi ottengano una copertura diffusa, soprattutto quando c'è una recidiva grave dopo una precedente condanna all'ergastolo.

src: And he is quick to point out that it was a joint decision to make a serious bid.
mt: Y él es rápido en señalar que fue una decisión conjunta hacer una oferta seria.

src: There are times when Chancellors are right to fuss with mini-measures, and there are times when they need to make an instant impact.
mt: Hay momentos en los que los cancilleres tienen razón al preocuparse por las mini-medidas y hay momentos en los que necesitan tener un impacto instantáneo.

src: Mr Heseltine made no comment on the report, which does not form part of the Government's coal review, expected to be published next week.
mt: El Sr. Heseltine no hizo ningún comentario sobre el informe, que no forma parte de la revisión del carbón del Gobierno, que se espera publicar la próxima semana.

src: But he admitted he could not be sure he saw a soldier make contact with another soldier with his rifle.
mt: Sin embargo, admitió que no podía estar seguro de haber visto a un soldado hacer contacto con otro soldado con su rifle.

src: It is impossible to make a technical distinction between strategic planning and business planning: both use techniques such as SWOT analysis.
mt: È impossibile fare una distinzione tecnica tra pianificazione strategica e pianificazione aziendale: entrambi utilizzano tecniche come l'analisi SWOT.

src: He then suggests that the former can either directly create the conditions for the reproduction of the relations of production, presumably by quelling any sign of working class insubordination (i.e., a feature of economic practice depends upon political practice), or they can do so indirectly, by establishing a situation in which ideological state apparatuses can do their work (i.e., in which ideological practice determines economic practice).

src: Pacifists in the ILP and BSP, Jones argued, had done more harm to the working-class movement than could have been inflicted by the Municipal Alliance.
mt: Los pacifistas del ILP y el BSP, Jones argumentaba, habían hecho más daño al movimiento de la clase trabajadora del que podría haber hecho la Alianza Municipal.

src: With good colour, sweet flavour and generous crops, it makes an ideal replacement for the difficult to grow ‘Bramley’, and another advantage is its mildew resistance.
mt: Con un buon colore, un sapore dolce e raccolti abbondanti, è un sostituto ideale per il difficile da coltivare ‘Bramley’, e un altro vantaggio è la sua resistenza alla muffa.

src: And did they do any Did they do a trade comparable to the Cooperative?
mt: ¿Y hicieron algún tipo de intercambio comparable al de la Cooperativa?

src: A huddle of passengers gathered round the steps of the carriage to get a look at the reading and, lest their breathing distort the figure, Nadia held it aloft like a fish between finger and thumb.
mt: Un grupo de pasajeros se reunió alrededor de los escalones del vagón para ver la lectura y, para que su respiración no distorsionara la figura, Nadia la sostuvo en alto como un pez entre el dedo índice y el pulgar.

src: ‘Despite the appalling business of dropping GMTV in it three weeks before they went on the air, it was far better to make a clean break.
mt: “A pesar del espantoso asunto de dejar a GMTV en el aire tres semanas antes de que salieran al aire, fue mucho mejor hacer una ruptura limpia.

src: A FOOTBALLER who elbowed an opponent in the face, shattering his cheekbone, made an ‘ordinary aerial challenge,’ a top soccer official told a court yesterday.
mt: Un jugador de fútbol que dio un codazo a un oponente en la cara, rompiéndole el hueso de la mejilla, hizo un “desafío aéreo ordinario”, dijo ayer un alto cargo del fútbol a un tribunal.

src: PREMIER John Major was given some Christmas cheer last night when top economists forecast economic revival in Britain next year.
mt: El primer ministro John Major recibió un mensaje de Navidad anoche cuando los principales economistas pronosticaron una recuperación económica en Gran Bretaña el próximo año.

src: Julie screamed and took a step back.
mt: Julie gritó y dio un paso atrás.

src: And I have to say that we're talking about a limited number of people, that even if you deter half a dozen young fire setters in a year, you'd probably made a fairly substantial impact in Shropshire.
mt: Y tengo que decir que estamos hablando de un número limitado de personas, que incluso si se disuade a media docena de jóvenes incendiarios en un año, probablemente se haya tenido un impacto bastante sustancial en Shropshire.

src: Would you, would you like to do a group collaboration on this one, because erm, can you come up with a version that your group agrees on?

mt: È ancora troppo presto per esprimere un giudizio sull'importanza relativa di questi diversi fattori.

mt: Ahora, creo que una vez que hayamos establecido eso, podemos tener un argumento sobre si los miembros necesitan más asistencia, pero al menos estamos discutiendo sobre la misma base, ¿no?

src: I am Mrs who's sort of the secretary and books, does the booking for the hall, he couldn't get that, anyway it occurred to me afterwards it must of been the grandmother of that girl that bought the erm, cos he kept on talking a Michelle and that's the girl that bought our suite and I reckon it's her child's birthday party, she said erm you know my, you know my son-in-law, I said do I?
mt: Soy la Sra. que es una especie de secretaria y hace las reservas de la sala, él no pudo conseguirlo, de todos modos, después me di cuenta de que debe haber sido la abuela de esa chica que compró el erm, porque él seguía hablando de Michelle y esa es la chica que compró nuestra suite y creo que es la fiesta de cumpleaños de su hijo, ella dijo erm, ¿sabes a mi, sabes a mi yerno?, le dije, ¿lo conozco?

src: Oh look Terry I've done an advertisement in the back
mt: Mira, Terry, he hecho un anuncio en la parte de atrás

src: A late claim will not be accepted where the delay is due to: oversight or negligence on the part of the claimant company or its agent; failure without good reason to compute the necessary figure; and a desire to avoid establishing the claim pending clarification of the effects of making a claim on other tax liabilities.
mt: Un reclamo tardivo non sarà accettato se il ritardo è dovuto a: un’incuria o una negligenza da parte della società richiedente o del suo agente; un’omissione senza una buona ragione per calcolare la cifra necessaria; e un desiderio di evitare di stabilire il reclamo in attesa di chiarimenti sugli effetti della presentazione di un reclamo su altre passività fiscali.

src: Hanson made its first big UK acquisition in 1981 when it bought Berec, the maker of Ever Ready batteries.
mt: Hanson hizo su primera gran adquisición en Reino Unido en 1981 cuando compró Berec, el fabricante de baterías Ever Ready.

src: By the time I came to do my first talk, her feathers were a lovely tawny colour with large patches flecked with grey and smaller specks of black and white.
mt: Quando sono venuto a tenere il mio primo discorso, le sue piume erano di un bel colore fulvo con grandi macchie screziate di grigio e piccole macchie di nero e bianco.

src: We were in the sports hall and she flew right up on to the top of the climbing frame at the far end from where I was giving my little lecture.
mt: Estábamos en el gimnasio y ella voló directamente a la parte superior del marco de escalada en el extremo opuesto de donde yo estaba dando mi pequeña conferencia.

src: Others relax by listening to popular music on the local Armed Forces Radio station: Schoendoerffer makes an amusingly wicked use of Nancy Sinatra's These Boots Are Made For Walking .
mt: Otros se relajan escuchando música popular en la estación de radio de las Fuerzas Armadas locales: Schoendoerffer hace un uso divertidamente maligno de These Boots Are Made For Walking de Nancy Sinatra.

src: And we've been waiting and waiting and waiting now for a week to get this reconciliation at least together so that we could go out and re-count whatever was required.
mt: Y hemos estado esperando y esperando y esperando durante una semana para lograr esta reconciliación al menos juntos para que podamos salir y volver a contar lo que sea que se requiera.

src: When the Girls left to get married at the end of each show, rather than risk Jennie's haphazard choice of replacements, she sent over the two Head Girls who were almost resident in America, Rene Todd or Dorothy Sabine, to make their own selection.
mt: Cuando las chicas se iban a casar al final de cada espectáculo, en lugar de arriesgarse con la elección azarosa de Jennie de sus sustitutos, ella enviaba a las dos chicas principales que casi residían en Estados Unidos, Rene Todd o Dorothy Sabine, para que hicieran su propia selección.
